ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start date and time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End date and time of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the experiment (e.g., planned, in progress, completed) */,
  "principal_investigator" TEXT /* Lead researcher or principal investigator */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scenarios" (
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scenario */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the scenario belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the scenario */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the scenario */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the scenario (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "pressure" REAL /* Pressure of the scenario (in Pascals) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the scenario is being studied */,
  "environment_type" TEXT /* Type of environment (e.g., marine, terrestrial, industrial) */,
  "source_data" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the scenario */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scenarios_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "minerals" (
  "mineral_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mineral */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario the mineral belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the mineral */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Composition of the mineral (e.g., chemical formula) */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the mineral present (in moles) */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the mineral */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the mineral */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the mineral data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mineral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_minerals_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "solutions" (
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each solution */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario the solution belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the solution */,
  "composition" TEXT /* Composition of the solution (e.g., chemical formula) */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH of the solution */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the solution (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "conductivity" REAL /* Electrical conductivity of the solution */,
  "osmotic_pressure" REAL /* Osmotic pressure of the solution */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the solution data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("solution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_solutions_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reaction_rates" (
  "reaction_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reaction rate */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario the reaction rate belongs to */,
  "mineral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mineral involved in the reaction */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution involved in the reaction */,
  "rate" REAL /* Rate of the reaction (in moles per second) */,
  "activation_energy" REAL /* Activation energy of the reaction */,
  "catalyst" TEXT /* Catalyst used in the reaction */,
  "reference_conditions" TEXT /* Reference conditions (e.g., standard temperature and pressure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reaction_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_rates_scenario_id FOREIGN KEY ("scenario_id") REFERENCES scenarios ("scenario_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_rates_mineral_id FOREIGN KEY ("mineral_id") REFERENCES minerals ("mineral_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reaction_rates_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_points" (
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the data point belongs to */,
  "time" INTEGER /* Time at which the data point was collected (in seconds) */,
  "mineral_id" INTEGER /* ID of the mineral involved in the reaction */,
  "solution_id" INTEGER /* ID of the solution involved in the reaction */,
  "pH" REAL /* pH of the solution at the time of data collection */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature of the solution at the time of data collection (in degrees Celsius) */,
  "concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the mineral or solution */,
  "conductivity" REAL /* Electrical conductivity of the solution */,
  "osmotic_pressure" REAL /* Osmotic pressure of the solution */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_point_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_solution_id FOREIGN KEY ("solution_id") REFERENCES solutions ("solution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_points_mineral_id FOREIGN KEY ("mineral_id") REFERENCES minerals ("mineral_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password chosen by the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the permission belongs to */,
  "scenario_id" INTEGER /* ID of the scenario the permission applies to */,
  "permission" TEXT /* Type of permission (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "scope" TEXT /* Scope of the permission (e.g., all data, specific data points) */,
  "expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "data_point_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the version belongs to */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time the version was created */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_data_point_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_point_id") REFERENCES data_points ("data_point_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metadata belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the metadata */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the metadata */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., experimental, simulation) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "validation_status" TEXT /* Validation status of the metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "documentation" (
  "documentation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each documentation entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the documentation belongs to */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the documentation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the documentation */,
  "document_type" TEXT /* Type of documentation (e.g., methods, results) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number of the documentation */,
  "date_created" TEXT /* Date the documentation was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("documentation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_documentation_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the publication belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal in which the publication was published */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL where the publication can be accessed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Publication status (e.g., accepted, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
